title: Who Was David Wilcock? UFO Writer Death Probe Sparks Claims of Hidden Files and Government UFO Disclosure Pressure
description: The death of UFO writer David Wilcock in Colorado has sparked conspiracy theories and debate over government UFO secrecy, with authorities investigating the incident as a mental health crisis.

title: Disappearances of Scientists Fuel UFO and Cover-Up Conspiracy Theories
description: The unexplained vanishing of an aeronautical engineer with ties to UFO research, along with the deaths or disappearances of 10 other scientists, has sparked a conspiracy theory gaining mainstream attention. The theory suggests a government cover-up related to UFOs, plasma technology, or other classified research.

title: US Representative Claims 'Sinister' UFO Files Exist as He Reveals Death Threats and Underwater Alien Bases
description: US Representative alleges government secrecy on UFOs, calls for full disclosure, and reveals receiving death threats over his stance. He highlights unexplained sightings and underwater phenomena.
